summary: Hezbollah launched multiple rocket attacks from Lebanon toward the Western Galilee, Safed, and Karmiel, with several interceptions and no reported injuries. An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed Sgt. Michael Tyukin and wounded four soldiers, while a separate attack injured two Israeli officers. The IDF commenced a broad operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki area and updated civil defense alert levels across northern communities.
key_points: Hezbollah launched rockets from Lebanon at the Western Galilee; some were intercepted, others landed in open areas with no injuries (Source: @manniefabian/58319).
Two rockets were fired by Hezbollah at Safed; one was intercepted and the other struck an open area, causing no injuries (Source: @manniefabian/58317).
Hezbollah expanded fire, launching rockets toward Karmiel (Source: @New_security8200/200350).
An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed Sgt. Michael Tyukin and lightly wounded four other soldiers (Source: @N12chat/210046).
Two Israeli officers were seriously injured when a house in south Lebanon, hosting an Israeli brigade commander, was targeted (Source: @naya_foriraq/76477).
The IDF began a wide‑scale operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki area of south Lebanon to destroy infrastructure and eliminate militants (Source: @idf_telegram/24006).
Israel’s Home Front Command updated alert levels for numerous northern communities, restricting public activities and limiting gatherings (Source: @idf_telegram/23996).

sections.executive_summary: Hezbollah launched rockets toward the Western Galilee, Safed, and Karmiel, with several interceptions and no casualties. An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed Sgt. Michael Tyukin and wounded four soldiers. The IDF started a broad operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki area and raised civil defense alerts across northern Israel.

points: The IDF reported multiple rocket interceptions after alerts in northern Israel, confirming that rockets from Lebanon were neutralized before reaching populated areas (Source: @idf_telegram/23995).
Civil defense directives limited educational activities, set gathering caps (50 outdoors, 200 indoors), and closed beaches for communities along the confrontation line (Source: @idf_telegram/23996).
Prime Minister Netanyahu is scheduled to hold a security assessment meeting with the Defense Minister and the Chief of Staff following intensified Hezbollah fire (Source: @pkpoi/142301).
IDF spokesperson announced that a second rocket launch from Lebanon was intercepted, reinforcing the ongoing aerial threat (Source: @idf_telegram/23993).

Hezbollah fired rockets at the Western Galilee, Safed, and Karmiel, with some rockets intercepted and others landing in open areas without causing injuries (Sources: @manniefabian/58319, @manniefabian/58317, @New_security8200/200350).
An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed Sgt. Michael Tyukin and wounded four other soldiers during a Givati Brigade operation (Source: @N12chat/210046).
Two Israeli officers were seriously injured when a house in south Lebanon, occupied by an Israeli brigade commander, was hit by a targeted attack (Source: @naya_foriraq/76477).
The IDF launched a broad operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki region to destroy militant infrastructure and eliminate threats (Source: @idf_telegram/24006).
Reports indicate ongoing heavy fighting and numerous casualties among Israeli forces in south Lebanon (Source: @lelotsenzura/92358).

key_developments: Hezbollah launched rockets from Lebanon at the Western Galilee; some were intercepted and others landed in open areas with no injuries (Source: @manniefabian/58319).
Two rockets were fired by Hezbollah at Safed; one was intercepted and the other struck an open area, causing no injuries (Source: @manniefabian/58317).
Hezbollah expanded fire, launching rockets toward Karmiel (Source: @New_security8200/200350).
An Israeli drone strike in south Lebanon killed Sgt. Michael Tyukin and lightly wounded four other soldiers (Source: @N12chat/210046).
Two Israeli officers were seriously injured when a house in south Lebanon, hosting an Israeli brigade commander, was targeted (Source: @naya_foriraq/76477).
The IDF began a wide‑scale operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki area of south Lebanon to destroy infrastructure and eliminate militants (Source: @idf_telegram/24006).
Israel’s Home Front Command updated alert levels for numerous northern communities, restricting public activities and limiting gatherings (Source: @idf_telegram/23996).
sections.threat_assessment: Hezbollah’s renewed rocket launches toward multiple northern Israeli locales indicate an escalation in cross‑border hostilities, stressing Israel’s air‑defense systems. Israeli drone operations in south Lebanon have resulted in combat fatalities, suggesting intensified ground engagements. The broadened IDF operation in the Bofar ridge and Nahal Saluki region reflects a shift toward pre‑emptive strikes to degrade Hezbollah capabilities.
sections.regional_response: Israel has heightened civil defense alerts across the northern confrontation line, limiting civilian movement and public gatherings. The IDF continues to intercept incoming projectiles, demonstrating operational readiness. International observers note the risk of further escalation if rocket fire persists or ground operations expand.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Hezbollah launch sites in southern Lebanon is critical as rocket trajectories have diversified toward the Galilee, Safed, and Karmiel. The recent drone strike casualties underscore the vulnerability of Israeli forces operating near the border. Continued assessment of IDF operational tempo in the Bofar and Nahal Saluki zones will inform future threat projections.
